PP-OCR optional modules third-party notices
============================================

PaddleOCR / PP-OCRv6 models
Copyright (c) PaddlePaddle Authors.
Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
https://github.com/PaddlePaddle/PaddleOCR

RapidOcrNet
Copyright (c) BobLd and RapidOCR contributors.
Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
https://github.com/BobLd/RapidOcrNet

RapidOCR
Copyright (c) RapidAI contributors.
Licensed under the Apache License, Version 2.0.
https://github.com/RapidAI/RapidOCR

ONNX Runtime
Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation.
Licensed under the MIT License.
https://github.com/microsoft/onnxruntime

SkiaSharp
Copyright (c) Microsoft Corporation.
Licensed under the MIT License.
https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp

Clipper2
Copyright (c) Angus Johnson.
Licensed under the Boost Software License 1.0.
https://github.com/AngusJohnson/Clipper2

The complete license texts and source notices are available from the project links above.
The PP-OCR module packages preserve this notice file beside the binaries and model files.
